name: Image Gen (ComfyUI)
author: RAGdoll
description: Generate images using a locally running ComfyUI server.
long_description: Adds a `generate_image_comfyui` tool that submits a prompt to a local ComfyUI instance via its API and returns the generated image as a base64 data URI. Requires ComfyUI running locally.

config_fields.label: ComfyUI host
config_fields.help: Host and port of your local ComfyUI server.

config_fields.label: Checkpoint model
config_fields.help: Model checkpoint filename as it appears in ComfyUI's model list.

config_fields.label: Steps
config_fields.help: Number of diffusion steps (higher = slower but better quality).
